title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition's FrontierCode benchmark measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready, not just test-passing. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics based on 36 open-source repositories to assess code review standards.
